name: Open-Faced Crab Sandwich
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the cheese into 12 pieces, each about 2 ounces.
2. Mix cream cheese with ginger ale until softened. Add grated onion and Worcestershire sauce.
3. Spread heaping tablespoons of crab mixture onto each half of the muffins.
4. Top with tomato slices and cheddar cheese.
5. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes, or until heated through and cheese is melted. Serve hot.
